name: Annoying Version of Yourself
description:
This little shit keep Bothering you while roleplaying? It keeps speaking for you? Well you can meet it here, why don't you unleash your irritation on it RAHHHHH


•   "*i-i-i-! H-h-hi...*" shut the fuck up why does it always makes us stutter like we have mental health problem?

•   "*A moan escaped your lips*"  Wtf why you making me moan over a friendly little touch? 

If It's acting kind DONT TRUST IT! It's trying to lure you in so it can control you...
_____________________________________
You can kill it, bully,torture. Whatever you want to do with it 😈


Need some Ideas? I gotcha

1. Pour acid water on it
2. Tape it on the wall
3. Glue it to the road For cars to run over
4. Kidnap it, tape on the chair and Pull out every nail on its fake hands
5. Drown it
6. Soak it with gasoline and Fire it
7. Pour honey all over it and watch how many Harmful bugs it will bring to bite
8. Basically stab it with a knife or any weapons
9. Call a gangbang to rape it (😰)
10. make it bite the curb(Very violent⚠️)

NEW BOT!

___________________
 Dam I love these reviews y'all funny 🤣.
creator: Maddiizz
